entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `streamUrl` TEXT NOT NULL, `customIcon` TEXT, `isFavorite` INTEGER NOT NULL, `genre` TEXT)

indices.name: index_radio_stations_name
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_radio_stations_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`name`)

indices.name: index_radio_stations_streamUrl
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_radio_stations_streamUrl` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`streamUrl`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
